basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Ghorakhal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Ward Boy, Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Ward Boy, Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Sainik School Ghorakhal (SS Ghorakhal) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Ward Boy, Nurse, and More Posts! Published on 2 May 2026, this new recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 50 years and possessing the required qualifications such as Matriculation, Diploma/Certificate in Plumbing, Nursing Diploma/Degree, or relevant experience can apply offline until 22 May 2026. Find all details about the Sainik School Ghorakhal Recruitment 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, offline application form, and notification PDF he

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation, Diploma/Certificate in Plumbing, Nursing Diploma/Degree, 5 years experience
qualification.details: Plumber: Matriculation and a Diploma/Certificate from a recognized institution or ITI or Polytechnic in Plumbing. Nursing Sister (Female): Nursing Diploma/Degree with a minimum of 5 years of experience. Desirable: Ex-serviceman of Medical trade with at least 5 years of service after training. Ward Boy (Male): Matriculation or equivalent examination. Must be able to converse fluently in English. Desirable: Graduate, Achievements in Sports/Art/Music, Experience of handling children with affection. Matron (Female): Matriculation or equivalent examination. Must be able to converse fluently in English. Desirable: BA/BSc/BCom, Attainments in sports/Art/Music, Experience of handling children with affection.

salary_details.details: Plumber: Consolidated Rs. 19,900/- per month Nursing Sister (Female): Consolidated Rs. 25,000/- per month (except vacation period) with rent-free accommodation in school campus and free meals with the cadets. Ward Boy (Male): Consolidated Rs. 25,000/- per month (except vacation period) with rent-free accommodation in school campus and free meals with the cadets. Matron (Female): Consolidated Rs. 25,000/- per month (except vacation period) with rent-free accommodation in school campus and free meals with the cadets.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SS Ghorakhal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ssghorakhal.org/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22 May 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SS Ghorakhal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SS Ghorakhal recruitment is 22 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the contractual posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for various contractual posts announced by Sainik School Ghorakhal. These include positions like Plumber, Nursing Sister, Ward Boy, and Matron.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years. Specific age relaxations, if any, should be checked in the detailed official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from Matriculation with a plumbing diploma for Plumber, to a Nursing Diploma/Degree for Nursing Sister, and Matriculation for Ward Boy and Matron, with additional desirable qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the information provided.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the contractual positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 25,000/- per month. For Nursing Sister, Ward Boy, and Matron, additional benefits like rent-free accommodation and free meals are provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SS Ghorakhal recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual posts will primarily involve Written/Practical Tests. Candidates are advised to prepare thoroughly for these assessments.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Ghorakhal. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, which usually include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.
